name: Lisa
transcript: Hi, I'm Lisa and my role at WiteMind is FX Communication and Community. I facilitate the understanding of advanced technology, built transparent communication channels and contribute to responsible AI guidelines that connect the product with its user and society.

name: Moritz
transcript: Hello, this is Moritz Bauman and I'm a software engineer and in the past seven years I have built software for automotive companies. My passion is taking a product from the initial idea to the finished solution and shaping the bigger picture. Now I'm excited to bring my experience to Weibmahn in the role of the lead engineer.

name: Stephane
transcript: Hi, my name is Stephane. I am the head of growth of VibeMind. I've been launching AI products for a while. I was an ex-founder and I sold my company just before that. I worked at different companies including Lovable and I scaled it into 75 million ARR. And right now I work for a legal tech company but I also part-time help Felix and the team to scale VibeMind. I'm obsessed with product growth and shipping things very fast. I've been working with Felix on AI agents and the future of AGI. So I'm super looking forward to working with him and bring this product to scale.
